semantic.role: Vitest test specification for footprint stability invariants
responsibilities: Verifies that calculateStructuralFootprint produces identical hashes despite import/export ordering noise
Verifies that calculateSemanticFootprint detects changes in function body content
invariants: Test files must end with .test.ts or .spec.ts (rule: test-file-suffix)

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Establish regression tests for footprint stability invariants to ensure the sync system's semantic short-circuit mechanism works correctly
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: Add test coverage for structural and semantic footprint stability as part of the json-only sync mode feature

English.role: Vitest test specification for footprint stability invariants
responsibilities: Verifies that calculateStructuralFootprint produces identical hashes despite import/export ordering noise
Verifies that calculateSemanticFootprint detects changes in function body content

Simplified Chinese.role: 用于足迹稳定性不变量的 Vitest 测试规范
responsibilities: 验证 calculateStructuralFootprint 在导入/导出顺序噪声下仍能生成相同的哈希值
验证 calculateSemanticFootprint 能够检测函数体内容的变化
outOfScope: 生产环境中的足迹计算逻辑
与其他系统组件的集成
足迹算法的性能基准测试
